message:
Merge pull request #75 from kubestellar/fix/feedback-remove-issues-permission

🐛 Fix reusable-feedback.yml: remove issues: write permission

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,6 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     permissions:
       pull-requests: write
-      issues: write
       contents: read
     steps:
       - name: Comment feedback request
